plan.title: Surface human-clearance backlog and the earned-autonomy dial

narratives.Description: Adds a pending-human-decisions backlog surface and an autonomy dial that ratchets required human clearances based on the clearance-override rate (primary) and the rework rate (guardrail) over the capacity window. Per OQ1 (resolved 2026-06-04) the dial has three levels (Observe, Escalate, Execute) per gate-id, advances asymmetrically, and is advisory-only in v1; per OQ4 (trial) multi-LLM reviewer disagreement reuses the #526 errored-state machinery and escalates contested P0/P1 findings to human adjudication.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Extend scripts/capacity_show.py and scripts/triage_welcome.py to compute and render a pending-human-decisions count from the audit log, and add an autonomy policy block in scripts/policy.py. 2. Add tests in tests/cli/test_capacity_show.py covering the backlog threshold nudge and an autonomy-level ratchet against synthetic override-rate fixtures.
narratives.UserStory: As a maintainer, I want the human-clearance backlog made visible, so that wipCap can be tuned to real review throughput.

items.title: Given pending clearances above the threshold, when triage:welcome runs, then it emits a Tier-1 pending-decisions nudge.

narrative.Acceptance: Given pending clearances above the threshold, when triage:welcome runs, then it emits a Tier-1 pending-decisions nudge.

items.title: When the override rate stays low over the window, then the autonomy dial advances and reduces required human clearances.

narrative.Acceptance: When the override rate stays low over the window, then the autonomy dial advances and reduces required human clearances.

items.title: When the rework rate spikes over the window, then the autonomy dial ratchets back and restores required clearances.

narrative.Acceptance: When the rework rate spikes over the window, then the autonomy dial ratchets back and restores required clearances.

items.title: Given multi-LLM reviewers split on a P0 finding, when the review cycle resolves, then the disagreement escalates to a human and increments the pending-decisions backlog.

narrative.Acceptance: Given multi-LLM reviewers split on a P0 finding, when the review cycle resolves, then the disagreement escalates to a human and increments the pending-decisions backlog.

expected_outputs: triage:welcome surfaces a pending-human-decisions backlog nudge
autonomy dial advances and retreats on override-rate fixtures

references.title: Issue #1419: RFC: Agentic Prioritization & Coordination Model for Deft Directive
